tanstackrouter.name: TanStack Router
tanstackrouter.description: TanStack Router is a type-safe routing library for JavaScript and TypeScript applications.

tanstackstart.name: TanStack Start
tanstackstart.description: TanStack Start is a full-stack React framework built on TanStack Router.

tanstackquery.name: TanStack Query
tanstackquery.description: TanStack Query is an asynchronous state management and data-fetching library for web applications.

helply.name: Helply
helply.description: Helply is a customer support and AI chat platform for adding live chat and automated assistance to websites.

uvicorn.name: Uvicorn
uvicorn.description: Uvicorn is an ASGI web server implementation for Python applications.

cloudflarewebanalytics.name: Cloudflare Web Analytics
cloudflarewebanalytics.description: Cloudflare Web Analytics is a privacy-focused analytics service that measures website traffic and web performance using Cloudflare's beacon script.

plausibleanalytics.name: Plausible Analytics
plausibleanalytics.description: Plausible Analytics is a privacy-focused web analytics platform.

openai.name: OpenAI
openai.description: OpenAI is an artificial intelligence research and deployment company that provides AI models, APIs, and products such as ChatGPT.

zoom.name: Zoom
zoom.description: Zoom is a communications platform for video meetings, webinars, chat, and collaboration.

smartsheet.name: Smartsheet
smartsheet.description: Smartsheet is a collaborative work management platform for project tracking, automation, and team workflows.

salesforcepardot.name: Salesforce Pardot
salesforcepardot.description: Salesforce Pardot, now Marketing Cloud Account Engagement, is a B2B marketing automation platform from Salesforce.

ciscocloudintelligence.name: Cisco Cloud Intelligence
ciscocloudintelligence.description: Cisco Cloud Intelligence is a Cisco cloud-domain verification and intelligence service used to validate domain ownership.

globalsign.name: GlobalSign
globalsign.description: GlobalSign is a certificate authority and identity services provider for TLS certificates, signing, and managed PKI.

box.name: Box
box.description: Box is a cloud content management and file collaboration platform for storing, sharing, and governing business content.

googleapps.name: Google Workspace
googleapps.description: Google Workspace, formerly Google Apps and G Suite, is Google's cloud productivity, email, and collaboration suite.

atlassian.name: Atlassian
atlassian.description: Atlassian provides collaboration, software development, project management, and IT service management products such as Jira and Confluence.

twilio.name: Twilio
twilio.description: Twilio is a customer engagement and communications platform for messaging, voice, email, authentication, and programmable communications APIs.

zoomalternative.name: Zoom
zoomalternative.description: Zoom is a communications platform for video meetings, webinars, chat, and collaboration.

uber.name: Uber
uber.description: Uber is a mobility, delivery, and logistics platform that provides ride-hailing, delivery, and business transportation services.

cursor.name: Cursor
cursor.description: Cursor is an AI-powered code editor and development environment built for pair-programming with AI assistance.

amazonroute53.name: Amazon Route 53
amazonroute53.description: Amazon Route 53 is AWS's scalable domain name system and domain registration service.

microsoftazuredns.name: Microsoft Azure DNS
microsoftazuredns.description: Microsoft Azure DNS hosts DNS zones and manages DNS records using Microsoft Azure infrastructure.
